;LOAD ingatellentSettings.qmd
SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
    INSERT {
        property var savedOrientation: 0
    }
END SLOT
AFFECT /qml/device/view/main/MainView.qml
TRAVERSE ?#root
TRAVERSE Binding[.target=documentOrientation]
REPLACE value WITH {
	value: {
            if (documentView.visible) {
                return documentView.item?.documentOrientation*90 + Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0 ? "" : documentView.item?.documentOrientation ;
            } else {
                return Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0 ? Qt.Vertical : Qt.Horizontal;
            }
        }
}
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE Connections[.target=documentView.item]
REPLACE onDocumentClosed WITH {
        function onDocumentClosed() {
            orientation.requestOneShotOrientation(Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
        }
}
END TRAVERSE
REBUILD Component.onCompleted
LOCATE AFTER STREAM / { /
INSERT {
     orientation.requestOneShotOrientation(Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT /qml/device/view/syncserviceexplorer/ExplorerHeader.qml
TRAVERSE ?#headerItem
LOCATE BEFORE SortDropdown#sortDropdown
INSERT {
	property var savedOrientation: Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation
        Rectangle {
            id: rotateIcon
		anchors {
	            left: sortDropdown.right
	            rightMargin: Values.designGridVerticalSpacing
	            verticalCenter: parent.verticalCenter
	        }
		width: ArkControls.Values.iconSize.medium
		height: ArkControls.Values.iconSize.medium

            ArkControls.Icon {
                source: "qrc:/ark/icons/arrow_counter_clockwise"
                anchors.centerIn: parent
                antialiasing: false
                size: ArkControls.Values.iconSize.medium
                color: Values.colorBlack
            }
            MouseArea {
                anchors.fill: parent
                onClicked: {
			Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation = (Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation + 270) % 360
			headerItem.orientation.requestOneShotOrientation(Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)
		}
                onPressAndHold: {
			Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation = (Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation + 90) % 360
			headerItem.orientation.requestOneShotOrientation(Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)
		} 
            }
        }
}
TRAVERSE SortDropdown#sortDropdown
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD anchors
LOCATE AFTER STREAM /rightMargin:/
INSERT {
ArkControls.Values.iconSize.medium + 2*
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT /qml/device/view/documentview/DocumentView.qml 
TRAVERSE ?#root > Connections[.target=KeyboardInfo]
REBUILD onKeyboardConnectedChanged
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM /exitTextMode/
INSERT {
if((portrait && Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0) || (!portrait && Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 90)) {
	Qt.callLater(orientation.requestOneShotOrientation,Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation);
}
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
TRAVERSE ?#toolbar
REBUILD onToggleOrientationSelected
LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / } /
INSERT {
if(!KeyboardInfo.keyboardConnected && ((portrait && Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 0) || (!portrait && Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation % 180 === 90))) {
	root.orientation.requestOneShotOrientation(Values.ingatellentSettings.savedOrientation)                                            
}
}
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
